title: ArchitectureKosmos Private Project Sources
description: Private source package for the ArchitectureKosmos/KosmoReferences operating doctrine: owner vision, AI workflow, ingestion rules, rights policy, data model, media/model policy and KosmoAsset lane. Source contents are not copied into the repo.

notes: This package stores absolute local paths, hashes and source roles only.
Private PDFs and Markdown documents remain outside the public repo content layer.
Local LLMs may use these sources for private project reasoning; public outputs require own-written summaries and explicit rights review.

sources.title: Architecture Cosmos Vision Document
sources.notes: Core private vision document for ArchitectureKosmos. Use as project intent source, not public corpus text.

sources.title: Architekturkosmos AI Workflow Pipeline Projekt Dokument
sources.notes: Private worker/pipeline doctrine. Already used in MarkItDown smoke, included here as authoritative project source.

sources.title: AI Reference Archive Vision
sources.notes: Reference-archive concept source for KosmoReferences scope and behavior.

sources.title: Book Library Ingestion
sources.notes: Defines ingestion direction for private books and lecture documents once the large library path is mounted/found.

sources.title: Pilot Entry Standard
sources.notes: Defines expected quality for reference entries and pilots.

sources.title: Rights and Public Sources
sources.notes: Private project rights policy. Public promotion must obey this source and the provenance gate.

sources.title: Kosmo Asset Library
sources.notes: Primary KosmoAsset doctrine for reusable 2D/3D/material/component database behavior.

sources.title: Media and Model Policy
sources.notes: Policy source for media/model use and file-level promotion review.

sources.title: Data Model
sources.notes: Private schema/modeling source for ArchitectureCosmos data structures.

sources.title: Database Architecture
sources.notes: Private database architecture source for KosmoReferences/KosmoData evolution.

candidate_projects.title: ArchitectureKosmos Data Lane Operating Doctrine
evidence: Sources cover owner vision, AI workflow, reference archive, book ingestion, entry standards, rights policy, data model and KosmoAsset.
The package is intended for local/private worker reasoning and not for public reproduction.

review_gates.notes: SHA-256 and byte counts recorded for all private local sources.
All sources are treated as private research/project sources; no source text or source files are public-ready.
Markdown sources are readable; PDFs need extraction/OCR review before structured private indexing.
No page-layout or figure/table extraction has been run for this package.
This package maps to system/operating knowledge, not a single public architecture reference entry.
KosmoAsset doctrine is included; no specific asset files are derived by this package.
Manifest stores only metadata and keeps source content private/local.

next_actions: Run private text extraction for the two PDFs into a non-public local output path.
Use these sources as the first internal doctrine corpus for KosmoReferences and KosmoAsset workers.
Mount or locate the large book/ETH/HSLU lecture library and add a separate private library package.
